fault_hypothesis: Line 70 truncates the planned allocations using `int()` (floor) instead of applying largest-remainder rounding, so the sum of allocations is less than `total` whenever fractional parts are discarded.

constraints.intent: After building allocations, their sum must equal the rounded sum of planned values (i.e. the original total).

spec.expr: sum(allocations__1) == sum(int(x) for x in planned__1) and sum(allocations__1) == round(sum(planned__1))

constraints.intent: The integer allocations must sum to the rounded total, not the floored total.
planned allocations should already sum to an integer (the total), so rounding should not change the sum.
The returned allocations must always sum to the original total.
